archetype: Automated Aquatic Invasive Species Early Detection and Response System for Great Lakes Shipping Locks
description: This system uses AI-powered image recognition and sensor data to detect invasive species in ballast water and hull fouling of ships passing through Great Lakes shipping locks, alerting authorities and vessel operators to prevent ecological disasters. It is used by shipping lock operators, conservation agencies, and vessel owners. The system's technical complexity lies in integrating real-time sensor data, image analysis, and compliance with international shipping regulations.
rules: MUST integrate with International Maritime Organization (IMO) ballast water management regulations
MUST comply with US Coast Guard and Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) regulations on invasive species management
MUST use American Society for Testing and Materials (ASTM) standards for water quality monitoring
MUST integrate with Automated Identification System (AIS) for vessel tracking
MUST adhere to National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) guidelines for aquatic invasive species detection and response
anti_patterns: DO NOT rely solely on manual inspections, as they are time-consuming and prone to human error
DO NOT use generic machine learning models without domain-specific training data
DO NOT neglect to consider the variability of aquatic ecosystems and species behavior
key_technical_challenges: Developing accurate image recognition models for diverse aquatic species and environments
Integrating real-time sensor data from multiple sources (e.g., water quality monitors, cameras, AIS)
Ensuring system scalability and reliability for high-volume shipping traffic

recommended_stack.language: Python + extensive libraries for image processing and machine learning
recommended_stack.framework: Flask + lightweight and flexible for real-time data processing
recommended_stack.database_engine: PostgreSQL + robust support for geospatial data and regulations
recommended_stack.cache: Redis + fast data caching for real-time analytics
recommended_stack.message_broker: RabbitMQ + reliable message queuing for distributed system integration
